title: User Registration and Authentication
description: Implement secure user registration and login system
userStory: As a new user, I want to create an account and log in securely to access platform content
acceptanceCriteria: Users can register with email/social media
User profile creation after initial signup

title: Content Browsing and Discovery
description: Create intuitive video browsing experience with multiple discovery methods
userStory: As a user, I want to easily find and explore video content across different categories

title: Video Playback Experience
description: Develop robust video streaming with high-quality playback features
userStory: As a viewer, I want a smooth and customizable video watching experience
acceptanceCriteria: Subtitles and multiple audio track support

title: Subscription and Monetization
description: Implement flexible subscription models and payment integration
userStory: As a potential subscriber, I want clear pricing and easy payment options

title: User Profile and Personalization
description: Create comprehensive user profile with personalization features
userStory: As a user, I want a personalized platform experience tailored to my preferences

title: Multi-Device Support
description: Ensure platform compatibility across various devices and screen sizes
userStory: As a user, I want to access content seamlessly across different devices
acceptanceCriteria: Smart TV and streaming device compatibility
